h1.visual_description: Not present in sample, but likely chapter-level titles.

h2.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif font, centered, used for table titles and major section breaks.
h2.example_text: Table 2. Women-Members of the House of Representatives per Region, 2007-2019

h3.visual_description: Bold, uppercase, sans-serif font used for table column headers.

visual_matchers.pattern: Centered bold text above a grid
Grid with thin black borders and alternating row heights based on text wrap
Parenthetical text containing a name and year, or name, year, and page number

markdown_grammar.table_style: markdown (simple grids) or html (for complex wrapping/alignment)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Running header at top: light gray text containing document title on left and page number on right (e.g., 'Overcoming Barriers to Filipino Women's Political Representation 15')
